title: Stackable Potions Datapack
description: This Datapack makes potions can stack to 16.
body:
# **_Stackable Potions Datapack_**
## By VentaCraft

This datapack makes potions stackable up to 16, but splash and lingering potions have a 3-second cooldown. Even potions that were made before will stack.
The Datapack is based on the mod "_StackablePotions_" that is not updated nowadays.

### Light Version:

Stackable Potions Datapack: Light Version is a version of stackable potions that is lighter to run but is also a limited version.

1. The light version is recommended for new world or older computers that can't or have difficulty with the normal version.

2. The datapacks remove the chest update, the inventory update, and the cursor update.

3. It still has a brewing stand update and dropped potions updated (because it updates the first 3 slots, the first 3 slots of a chest will also update!)
  
4. If you want to update a potion that isn't updated yet, just drop it on the ground.
